task_completion.description: Set the document page orientation to landscape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page displayed in the word processor (OpenOffice Writer) should be visibly wider than it is tall.

task_completion.description: Include the tour title and client name in the cover section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Italian Renaissance Tour' and 'Mr. & Mrs. Sterling' should be visible at the beginning of the document.

task_completion.description: Insert the agency logo in the cover section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image representing a logo should be visible at the top or cover area of the document.

task_completion.description: Format the daily itinerary details in a two-column layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the itinerary section should be split into two distinct vertical columns side-by-side on the page.

task_completion.description: Include day titles using heading styles and hotel details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Day titles (e.g., Day 1, Day 2) should be formatted distinctly (larger font, bolded) as headings. Hotel names like 'Hotel de Russie', 'Four Seasons', or 'Hotel Danieli' should be visible in the text.

task_completion.description: Incorporate the three destination images within the itinerary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three distinct photographs (representing Rome/Colosseum, Florence/Duomo, and Venice/Canal) should be embedded within the itinerary sections of the document.

task_completion.description: Save the completed proposal with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the OpenOffice Writer application should display 'Italy_Proposal_2025.odt' or a 'Save As' dialog should show this exact filename being saved.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (OpenOffice Writer) to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenOffice Writer interface being actively used, rather than a terminal window running a script to generate the .odt file.

integrity.description: The agent manually applied formatting like columns, orientation, and headings via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for open dialog boxes for 'Page Style' (for landscape/columns), 'Paragraph Style' (for headings), or 'Insert Image'.

integrity.description: The agent opened or read the source JSON file to get the itinerary data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor, terminal, or file viewer open with 'tour_data.json' to read the daily activities and hotel names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved exactly as 'Italy_Proposal_2025.odt'. It must be in landscape orientation (page is wider than it is tall) and feature a 2-column layout for the itinerary section. Expected text includes: 'Italian Renaissance Tour', 'Mr. & Mrs. Sterling', 'Hotel de Russie', 'Four Seasons', and 'Hotel Danieli'. There should be 4 images total: 1 logo on the cover and 3 destination images (Rome, Florence, Venice) placed within the itinerary.
